description: Example pull request with SQL model, export, and AI workflow changes.

changes.description: Revenue dashboard aggregates ARR by region.
changes.sql: SELECT region, SUM(arr) FROM customers GROUP BY region

changes.description: Analyst-facing customer detail model includes name and email.
changes.sql: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE region = 'EU'

changes.description: Marketing activation model selects names and email addresses.
changes.sql: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE marketing_consent = 'opted_in'

changes.description: CRM sync sends approved customer fields to Salesforce.
changes.use: sync approved customer fields to the CRM

changes.description: Fine-tune a support assistant on raw support ticket text.
changes.use: fine-tune a support assistant on ticket text
